title: CAU Imphal Teaching and Non Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 35 Posts
post_name: Dean, Director of Research, Registrar, Senior Computer Operator/Programmer, Professor, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor
short_info: Central Agricultural University, Imphal (CAU Imphal) Various Posts Notification 2026 has been released on 08-05-2026 on the official website of Central Agricultural University, Imphal . A total of 35 vacancies have been announced through the CAU Imphal Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Candidates with Ph.D., Master’s Degree with minimum 55% marks, NET/SLET/SET or equivalent qualification along with relevant teaching, research, or administrative experience are eligible to apply for these Various Posts vacancies. The online application process for CAU Imphal Various Posts Recruitment 2026 has star

age_limit.age_details: Max 40 years for Assistant Professor, below 60 for Dean/Director, below 57 for Registrar, 35 for Sr. Computer Operator. Age relaxation as per Govt. of India norms.
age_limit.details: Maximum age limit is 40 years for Assistant Professor. Maximum age limit is below 60 years for Dean/Director. Maximum age limit is below 57 years for Registrar. Maximum age limit is 35 years for Sr. Computer Operator. Age relaxation as per Government of India norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D., Master’s Degree with minimum 55% marks, NET/SLET/SET or equivalent, 10-15 years teaching/research/administrative experience
qualification.details: Dean, College of Horticulture, Bermiok, South Sikkim: Ph.D. + 15 years experience including 5 years as Professor or equivalent + administrative experience. Director of Research, CAU Hqrs, Imphal: Ph.D. + 15 years experience including 5 years as Professor or equivalent + research/extension experience. Registrar, CAU Hqrs, Imphal: Master’s with 55% + 15 years administrative experience including 8 years as Deputy Registrar or equivalent. Senior Computer Operator/Programmer: MCA/M.Sc. (CS/IT) or B.E./B.Tech. (CS/ECE) + 3 years experience in programming/University Information System. Professor (Various Disciplines): Ph.D. + 10 years experience (including as Associate Professor) + 10 publications with high NAAS rating. Associate Professor (Various Disciplines): Ph.D. + 8 years experience + good published work. Assistant Professor (Livestock Production Management): Master’s with 55% + NET/Ph.D. + publications.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Dean, College of Horticulture, Bermiok, South Sikkim
Director of Research, CAU Hqrs, Imphal

selection_process: Shortlisting based on academic and career performance Presentation/Seminar Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CAU Imphal Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CAU Imphal to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for CAU Imphal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for CAU Imphal Recruitment 2026 is 10 June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in CAU Imphal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 35 vacancies announced for various posts in the Central Agricultural University, Imphal recruitment drive for the year 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for General category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 1,000/-. SC, ST, and Women candidates are exempted from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum qualification required for most posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification generally includes a Master’s Degree with a minimum of 55% marks, along with NET/SLET/SET or equivalent. For higher posts, a Ph.D. and significant experience are required.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Assistant Professor post is 40 years. However, age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per Government of India norms.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting candidates based on their academic and career performance, followed by a presentation/seminar and a final interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the recruited posts?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the recruited posts ranges from Rs. 56,100/- to Rs. 1,44,200/- per month, depending on the post and level of recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Manipur apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates from all over India can apply for the CAU Imphal Recruitment 2026, provided they meet the specified eligibility criteria and qualifications for the respective posts.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any age relaxation for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an age relaxation of 5 years for SC/ST candidates, 3 years for OBC candidates, and 10 years for PwBD candidates, as per Government of India norms.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for CAU Imphal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link. It is highly recommended to read it thoroughly.
